summary: Tested Enhanced Locations Tab features in Asset Management V2 Rollout Management. All requested features are implemented and working correctly: new columns (Stationsname, Straße, PLZ, Stadt, Bundesland), Stadt/Bundesland dropdown filters, and filter functionality. Backend APIs return state field in location response, cities and states arrays in filters.

issues: Bundesland column shows both abbreviations (BY, NW, BE) and full names (Berlin, Hessen, Niedersachsen) - minor inconsistency in data

critical_code_review_comments: Backend API /api/asset-mgmt/locations properly returns state field in each location
Backend API returns cities and states arrays in filters object for dropdown population
City filter parameter (?city=BERLIN) correctly filters locations by city
State filter parameter (?state=BY) correctly filters locations by state
Frontend Locations table in Asset Management V2 shows all requested columns
Bundesland displayed as colored Badge component (blue background for dark theme)
Stadt and Bundesland dropdown filters work correctly and filter table data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Locations Tab in Asset Management V2 is complete. Navigate via Admin Portal > Assets > Rollout Management > Locations sub-tab. All columns (Location ID, Stationsname, Straße, PLZ, Stadt, Bundesland, Kunde, Slots, Status, Aktionen) are visible. Stadt and Bundesland dropdowns work for filtering. Backend API /api/asset-mgmt/locations returns state field and filter arrays.

features_tested.Backend API - state field in response: PASS - Location objects contain 'state' field with Bundesland abbreviations (BY, NW, BE, etc.)
features_tested.Backend API - cities array in filters: PASS - filters.cities returns sorted array of 160 cities
features_tested.Backend API - states array in filters: PASS - filters.states returns sorted array of 19 Bundesländer
features_tested.Backend API - city filter parameter: PASS - ?city=BERLIN correctly filters results to Berlin locations only
features_tested.Backend API - state filter parameter: PASS - ?state=BY correctly filters results to Bayern locations only
features_tested.Frontend - Locations table columns: PASS - Shows Location ID, Stationsname, Straße, PLZ, Stadt, Bundesland, Kunde, Slots, Status, Aktionen
features_tested.Frontend - Bundesland as colored badge: PASS - Bundesland displayed with blue badge styling (NW, BY, BE, Berlin, etc.)
features_tested.Frontend - Stadt dropdown filter: PASS - Dropdown shows 'Alle Städte (160)' with all cities, filters table when city selected
features_tested.Frontend - Bundesland dropdown filter: PASS - Dropdown shows 'Alle Bundesländer' with all states, filters table when state selected
features_tested.Frontend - Filter functionality city: PASS - Selecting city filters locations to that city only
features_tested.Frontend - Filter functionality state: PASS - Selecting state (BY) filters locations to Bayern only
